mapper.sql:
SELECT CONCAT('ISSUE-WAIT-', po.payment_order_id) AS issue_no, po.payment_order_id, po.order_no, po.customer_name, po.payment_method, po.channel_code, '待回调未收口' AS issue_type, 'danger' AS issue_type_tag, 'P1' AS severity, 'danger' AS severity_type, po.status AS payment_status, po.status_type AS payment_status_type, CONCAT('支付单仍处于待回调状态，最新回调结果=', COALESCE(latest_notify.notify_status, '无回调记录')) AS issue_summary, CONCAT('最近支付尝试=', COALESCE(latest_attempt.attempt_status, '无支付尝试'), '；建议优先主动查单并核对回调验签与状态收口。') AS root_cause_hint, '查看支付单并核对回调、日志和查单结果' AS recommended_action, CONCAT('/payments/', po.payment_order_id) AS recommended_route, DATE_FORMAT(po.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_order po LEFT JOIN t_payment_attempt latest_attempt ON latest_attempt.id = ( SELECT pa.id FROM t_payment_attempt pa WHERE pa.payment_order_id = po.payment_order_id ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC, pa.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN t_payment_notify_log latest_notify ON latest_notify.id = ( SELECT pnl.id FROM t_payment_notify_log pnl WHERE pnl.payment_order_id = po.payment_order_id ORDER BY pnl.created_at DESC, pnl.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE po.status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('ISSUE-NOTIFY-', pnl.notify_no) AS issue_no, pnl.payment_order_id, po.order_no, po.customer_name, po.payment_method, pnl.channel_code, '回调处理待跟进' AS issue_type, 'warn' AS issue_type_tag, 'P1' AS severity, 'danger' AS severity_type, po.status AS payment_status, po.status_type AS payment_status_type, CONCAT('渠道回调状态仍为', pnl.notify_status, '，回调类型=', pnl.notify_type) AS issue_summary, '回调日志已入库但尚未完成状态收敛，建议核对验签、去重、幂等与业务收口逻辑。' AS root_cause_hint, '进入支付处理日志页，联查回调报文与处理日志' AS recommended_action, CONCAT('/payment-logs?paymentOrderId=', pnl.payment_order_id, '&processStage=渠道回调') AS recommended_route, DATE_FORMAT(pnl.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_notify_log pnl INNER JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id WHERE pnl.notify_status = '待处理'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('ISSUE-EVENT-', pe.event_no) AS issue_no, pe.payment_order_id, po.order_no, po.customer_name, po.payment_method, po.channel_code, '下游事件发布失败' AS issue_type, 'info' AS issue_type_tag, 'P2' AS severity, 'warn' AS severity_type, po.status AS payment_status, po.status_type AS payment_status_type, CONCAT('支付事件发布失败，主题=', pe.event_topic, '，重试次数=', pe.retry_count) AS issue_summary, '支付主链路可能已成功，但下游账务/清分/结算未收到事件，建议优先补发并核对下游消费结果。' AS root_cause_hint, '进入支付事件出站页，复核发布状态并执行重发' AS recommended_action, CONCAT('/payment-events?paymentOrderId=', pe.payment_order_id, '&publishStatus=FAILED') AS recommended_route, DATE_FORMAT(pe.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_event pe INNER JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pe.payment_order_id WHERE pe.publish_status = 'FAILED'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('ISSUE-CHANNEL-', po.payment_order_id) AS issue_no, po.payment_order_id, po.order_no, po.customer_name, po.payment_method, po.channel_code, '命中停用渠道' AS issue_type, 'warn' AS issue_type_tag, 'P2' AS severity, 'warn' AS severity_type, po.status AS payment_status, po.status_type AS payment_status_type, CONCAT('支付单命中的渠道 ', po.channel_code, ' 当前已停用') AS issue_summary, '渠道配置已停用但支付单仍引用该渠道，建议核对路由规则、渠道启停和历史存量单据处理策略。' AS root_cause_hint, '进入支付渠道与路由页，复核渠道状态和路由规则' AS recommended_action, '/payment-config' AS recommended_route, DATE_FORMAT(po.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_order po INNER JOIN t_payment_channel_config pcc ON pcc.channel_code = po.channel_code WHERE pcc.status = 'DISABLED'
